context: "absent bow-tie" sign (SAG image) = peripheral image fails to demonstrate normal bow- | "fragment-in-notch" sign (COR image) = displaced fragment in intercondylar notch | "double PCL" sign (SAG image) = medial meniscal fragment displaced into notch
